pi_items.source: Cross-referenced setup_task.sh lines 40-42, export_result.sh line 53, verifier.py analysis, and task.json description. All three dashboard names are created via SQL INSERT in setup_task.sh and queried consistently across all scripts.

Cross-referenced setup_task.sh line 45 (DELETE statement), export_result.sh line 68 (SELECT query), verifier.py lines 53-58 (existence check), and task.json description line 5. All scripts consistently use 'Facility Kiosk' as the dashboard name to be created by the agent.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a navigation dashboard named 'Facility Kiosk' containing links to three pre-created target dashboards: Solar Array A, HVAC Main, and Lighting Zones. All three target dashboards are created dynamically during task setup via SQL INSERT statements in setup_task.sh. The kiosk dashboard itself is created by the agent and must contain a text widget with HTML links pointing to the correct dashboard IDs. The data is entirely synthetic, generated on-demand for each task instance.
